title: NBA Confirmed Board
subtitle: Day-of board after rotation, injury, and role assumptions are locked.

pick_of_day.summary: The same lane steps up once the minutes, role, and injury assumptions are no longer provisional.

rows.why: Confirmed Board removes the generic uncertainty hit and lets the matchup/usage edge stand on its own.
Cleaner read after the role and availability questions are settled.

games.note: Confirmed Board is the decision layer. It should overwrite Outlook automatically once verified.

notes: NBA Confirmed Board should replace Outlook whenever it exists.
Trend Board stays separate to validate recent form.
